name: USS Shannon (DM 25)
events: 21 Nov 1944 USS Shannon departed from Norfolk bound for the Pacific.
27 Nov 1944 USS Shannon arrived in the Panama Canal Zone.
27 Jan 1945 USS Shannon departed from Pearl Harbor bound for Eniwetok, then on to Saipan to participate in the Iwo Jima landings.
19 Feb 1945 USS Shannon arrived in the Iwo Jima area.
24 Feb 1945 USS Shannon departed from the Iwo Jima area bound for Saipan.
3 Mar 1945 USS Shannon returns to the Iwo Jima area.
8 Mar 1945 USS Shannon departed from the Iwo Jima area bound for Ulithi.
19 Mar 1945 USS Shannon departed from Ulithi to participate in the Okinawa campaign.
25 Mar 1945 USS Shannon arrived in the Okinawa area.
